info.description: API documentation for Permatatex IT Inventory System backend.
info.title: Permatatex IT Inventory API

post.description: Authenticates user using username, password, and Turnstile token, then returns JWT access token.

get.description: Returns authenticated user ID extracted from JWT token.

post.description: Allows a new partner/client to self-register an account and company profile.
Memprediksi jadwal menggunakan model TabPFN via Python Service
post.summary: AI Delivery Date Estimation untuk Order Baru

post.description: Decrease reconciliation material balance when raw material is taken out from warehouse for production.
Record received inventory, insert reconciliation receipt detail, and update reconciliation balance in one database call.

get.description: Mengambil log aktivitas sistem dengan paginasi.
Returns a paginated list of packing list headers.

post.description: Create packing list header with nested box items and size breakdowns in a single transaction.

get.description: Returns a single packing list with nested items and sizes.
Returns a paginated list of PO client headers for transaction screens.

parameters.description: Search by PO number, season, or mitra name
parameters.name: search

post.description: Create a PO client document with nested items and penanggung jawab in a single transaction.

get.description: Returns a single PO client with nested items and penanggung jawab.

put.description: Replace a PO client header, items, and penanggung jawab in a single transaction.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of PO internal headers.

parameters.description: Search by PO name, supplier, or CPO
parameters.name: search

post.description: Create a PO internal document with nested items in a single transaction.

get.description: Returns a single PO internal with nested items.
Returns a paginated list of PR internal headers.

parameters.description: Search by name, vendor, or projek
parameters.name: search

post.description: Create a PR internal document with nested items in a single transaction.

get.description: Returns a single PR internal with nested items.

patch.description: Manager approval endpoint that only changes PR internal status and audit fields.

get.description: Returns aggregated production progress per work order shell size.

parameters.description: Work Order shell size ID filter
parameters.name: id_wo_shell_size

get.description: Mengambil laporan kronologis pergerakan stok masuk (received) dan keluar (surat jalan).
Mengambil laporan stok material yang teragregasi berdasarkan kategori barang garmen.
Mengambil laporan stok material yang teragregasi berdasarkan lokasi penyimpanan rak.

post.description: Create lightweight production report for a specific division. Supported divisi: cutting, sewing, qc-finish, packing, pengiriman.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of client delivery notes.
Returns a single client delivery note.
Returns a paginated list of internal delivery notes.
Returns a single internal delivery note.

post.description: Create surat jalan document. Supported type: internal, client.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of users with their department and mitra names.

post.description: Creates a new user and assigns permissions in a single transaction.

get.description: Returns a single user detail with permissions.

put.description: Updates user profile and permissions in a single transaction. Password is optional.

delete.description: Deletes a user by ID. Protects Super Admin (ID 1) from deletion.

put.description: Approves a pending user registration, updating status to active.
Rejects a pending user registration, updating status to rejected.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of work orders for transaction screens.

parameters.description: Search by buyer, model, or PO number
parameters.name: search

post.description: Create a work order with shells, shell sizes, trims, and material list in a single transaction.

get.description: Returns a single work order with shells, trims, and material lists.

patch.description: Manager endpoint that only changes work order status and close audit fields.

get.description: Returns service health status, including database connectivity.
